name: oss-evidence
description: Generate source-linked, read-only evidence reports from public GitHub maintainer activity.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/write-dist-package.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .test-dist/test/*.test.js
scripts.schema:check: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && npm run build >/dev/null && node scripts/generate-schema.mjs "$tmpdir/report-v1.json" && cmp -s schema/report-v1.json "$tmpdir/report-v1.json"; code=$?; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit $code
scripts.check: biome check . && npm run evidence:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
